_README: Operating-cost model for Sebastian. Editable WITHOUT code changes. LLM spend is metered live (state/cost_ledger.jsonl); the numbers below are (a) per-token LLM prices and (b) your FIXED monthly costs. Values marked PLACEHOLDER are guesses — replace with your real figures so the burn-rate Sebastian sees is honest, not fictional. Prices are USD per 1,000 tokens.

local._note: local qwen — no API $, compute only

fixed_monthly_usd._note: host ≈ $100/mo current cloud hosting (user-confirmed ~$100+). domain 1.25 ≈ $15/yr for sebastianhunter.fun. vercel 0 = hobby tier. Bump host if the real bill is higher.

storage_wallet.purpose: funds Arweave archival via Irys (one-time per file)
storage_wallet.runway_signal: live SOL balance — cached to state/wallet_balance.json by archive.js

funding_goal._mode_note: 'mac' = raise capital for a dedicated machine (one-time); 'cloud' = cover recurring cloud hosting (monthly). Sets which target Sebastian reflects on.
funding_goal._mac_note: PLACEHOLDER — cost of the dedicated Mac you want to buy him (e.g. Mac mini ~$600, higher-spec ~$1400+). Set your real target.
funding_goal._cloud_note: PLACEHOLDER — $/month to host him in the cloud instead. Set if mode='cloud'.
funding_goal._raised_note: Amount raised toward the goal so far (update manually, or from tips). 0 until funding starts.
funding_goal.why: Sebastian currently runs on borrowed hardware; the goal is his own dedicated Mac (or cloud) so he can run sustainably and independently.
